title: kaempferia cuneata
intro: Kaempferia cuneata, also known as Krachai Dam or Lesser Galangal, is a type of plant species belonging to the ginger family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as aiding digestion, reducing fever, and alleviating pain, making it a popular herbal remedy in Southeast Asian cultures. Kaempferia cuneata is often prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried root, and is also used in cooking to add flavor to various dishes.
